name: Beep
description: Developer of a sharing visual tasks software designed to provide visual feedback and instructions. The company offers instant screenshots and hashtags for bookmarking webpages, enabling clients to get boosted team collaboration speed.

name: My AI
description: Developer of a blockchain-based loyalty rewards protocol platform intended to standardize and enhance the value of loyalty rewards. The company's platform allows bands of any size to create rewards that can be instantly redeemed across loyalty programs from around the world, they give brands all the control of a closed program with all the retention and new customer acquisition benefits of an open program, with one simple API (application programming interface) integration, thereby allowing bands of any size to create rewards that can be instantly redeemed across loyalty programs from around the world.

name: Perkskit LLC
description: Developer of an employee benefits management platform intended for perks providers to reach audiences and increase sales. The company's SaaS-enabled platform helps businesses create a streamlined employee experience to maximize HR investments and drive core business results, empowering businesses to better employee experiences.

name: STORI AI Inc.
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based marketing content automation software designed for streamlining brand building & content creation. The company's software forms an isolated brand identity tailored to goals, defining archetype, tone, tagline, and colors for a strong presence, enabling clients to captivate the audience with visually stunning and emotionally engaging content.
